service.description: Load a Moqui entity-facade-xml data file through the standard EntityDataLoader inside a running runtime. This is a runtime-safe fallback when offline Gradle load tasks are temporarily blocked by local temp/journal locks.

actions.script: def edl = ec.entity.makeDataLoader() .dummyFks(dummyFks) .useTryInsert(useTryInsert) .disableEntityEca(disableEntityEca) .disableAuditLog(disableAuditLog) .disableFkCreate(disableFkCreate) .disableDataFeed(disableDataFeed) .transactionTimeout(transactionTimeout) edl.location(location) recordsLoaded = edl.load() ec.cache.getCache("entity.sequence.bank")?.clear()

service.description: Delete and reload the artifact graph DataDocument/DataFeed definitions so stale fieldPath rows do not survive schema refactors.
Delete artifact graph DataDocument/DataFeed definitions so they can be reloaded in a separate transaction.
Remote-safe wrapper around standard DataFeed indexing for artifact graph DataDocuments.
Materialize graph-backed artifact documents directly from the authoritative Graph view-entity using DataDocument metadata.
Preview materialized artifact graph DataDocuments directly from GraphVertex/GraphEdge before indexing.
Preview the Graph + Parameter view-entity backing artifact DataDocuments.

Load offline-generated artifact graph JSONL files into moqui.math.GraphVertex and moqui.math.GraphEdge. This materializes the structural graph only; rich agent metadata remains in the JSONL/DataDocument layer.
Load a single artifact graph chunk in its own transaction. Intended for large graph batching.
Recompute full graph stats after chunked graph load and complete the MathModelRun once.
Load a large artifact graph in chunked sub-transactions and finalize the graph once at the end.
Read graph-derived structural impact for a materialized artifact vertex, especially services.
